name: Asparagus w/ Orange Cream Sauce and Cashews
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the asparagus until tender.
2. Section the orange and cut the sections into large pieces.
3. Add the orange pieces to the béchamel sauce and mix well.
4. Arrange the steamed asparagus in a serving dish.
5. Sprinkle salt over the asparagus.
6. Pour the orange béchamel sauce mixture over the asparagus.
7. Sprinkle the chopped cashew nuts on top.
8. Yield: 8 servings.
